channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Towards Chile’s Next Plan for Student Assessments
item.description: Towards Chile’s Next Plan for Student Assessments by Directorate for Education and Skills has an embargo on Tuesday 26 May 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: Restoring Public Finances - Enabling Effective Government
item.description: Restoring Public Finances - Enabling Effective Government by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Wednesday 27 May 2026 at 9:00.

item.title: Restaurer les finances publiques - Renforcer l’efficacité de l’action publique
item.description: Restaurer les finances publiques - Renforcer l’efficacité de l’action publique by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Wednesday 27 May 2026 at 9:00.

item.title: OECD Development Co‑operation Peer Reviews: Italy 2026
item.description: OECD Development Co‑operation Peer Reviews: Italy 2026 by Development Co-operation Directorate has an embargo on Wednesday 27 May 2026 at 10:00.

item.title: Peer Review dell'OCSE sulla Cooperazione allo Sviluppo: Italia 2026
item.description: Peer Review dell'OCSE sulla Cooperazione allo Sviluppo: Italia 2026 by Development Co-operation Directorate has an embargo on Wednesday 27 May 2026 at 10:00.

item.title: Public policy objectives of state-owned enterprises
item.description: Public policy objectives of state-owned enterprises by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Thursday 28 May 2026 at 0:01.

item.description: Building a global dataset on state-owned enterprises by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Friday 29 May 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: Strengthening capital markets in Bosnia and Herzegovina
item.description: Strengthening capital markets in Bosnia and Herzegovina by Global Relations and Cooperation Directorate has an embargo on Monday 1 June 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: OECD Economic Outlook, Volume 2026 Issue 1 - Not yet available
item.description: OECD Economic Outlook, Volume 2026 Issue 1 - Not yet available by Economics Department has an embargo on Wednesday 3 June 2026 at 9:00.

item.description: The impact of the conflict in the Middle East on agricultural markets by Trade and Agriculture Directorate has an embargo on Wednesday 3 June 2026 at 9:00.
